title: Forecast Row Race
intendedTensionBeat: The forecast row clearly marks the coming danger, forcing the player to count accepted actions on the lower route.
intendedReleaseBeat: A close lower rescue happens just before the forecast becomes flooded, proving the warning was actionable.
expectedPath: Use the shortest meaningful lower route, avoid non-route clears, rescue before the forecast row advances, then stabilize and finish the second target.
expectedFailMode: Player takes one or two attractive non-route clears and loses the water race despite having time to think.
designNotes: Pressure should come from action order and forecast readability, not from real-time urgency.
